title: Matrix Style Spy Action Sequence
description: A cinematic video prompt featuring a high-action martial arts fight in bullet time, reminiscent of The Matrix.
promptText: Ricardo goes full unstoppable Matrix mode, taking on 100 men with incredible martial arts and bullet time dodges, then defeats Dr. Evil one-on-one with superhuman power beyond any human limit in an explosive spy action climax.

title: Realistic Dango AI Robot Keychain Animation
description: A video prompt for a realistic AI robot keychain that can talk and move its limbs, based on a specific photo style.
promptText: Please make it talk, keeping the realistic feel of this 'Dango over flowers' photo. Make it an AI robot keychain. Please don't use plastic. Make the limbs move.

images.alt: Realistic Dango AI Robot Keychain Animation

title: Medieval Mansion Ghostly Mirror
description: A video prompt for a spooky 14th-century mansion hallway featuring a ghostly figure in an ornate mirror and suits of armor.
promptText: A 14th century ornate mirror standing in a dimly lit medieval mansion hallway, a ghostly translucent figure looking back from inside the mirror, lit by flaming wall torches, suits of medieval armor standing along the stone walls

title: Seamless Gothic Marionette Dragon Loop
description: A highly detailed 60fps video prompt for creating a seamless vertical loop of a majestic gothic dragon in a Victorian dress.
promptText:
Create a 6-second seamless looping video in vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, ultra-smooth 60fps, cinematic masterpiece quality using the pinnacle of 2026 Grok Imagine video engine — no text, no subtitles, no fonts, no watermarks, no cuts or brakes, perfectly fluid motion with zero jitter.

Main subject: the exact same majestic gothic marionette dragon from the previous image — life-sized dragon with cracked obsidian blood-red and black scales, glowing crimson eyes, sharp fangs, massive leathery wings with tattered gothic lace edges, wearing the exact ornate tattered red-and-black Victorian gothic dress with gold embroidery, corset, lace, and chains. The dress remains perfectly intact, fully covering, modest, and never removed, torn, slipped, altered, or affected by strings or movements in any way throughout the entire video — 100% clothed at all times with zero garment issues.

title: Dark Conveyor Belt Mystery
description: A cinematic prompt for a dark and mysterious scene featuring a single conveyor belt with motionless figures stretching into the distance.
promptText: A single conveyor belt with motionless people moving away towards infinity, dark and mysterious atmosphere.

title: Motivational Work Ethic Video
description: A video prompt based on a blunt motivational quote about working hard to achieve goals.
promptText: Everybody who wants anything is gonna have to work for it you don’t think you’re just gonna get it for fucking nothing. I don’t give a fuck.

title: Evil Space Sci-Fi Power Threshold
description: A dark, sci-fi digital art prompt depicting a threshold to an unfathomable cosmic power.
promptText:
Good Morning Humans !!

This is threshold beyond lies a power you cannot fathom, claim you destiny, evil space sci fi digital dark/TLV in corner no text

title: Italian World Cup Reaction
description: A prompt for generating a reaction video of an Italian woman reacting to Italy missing the World Cup for the third time.
promptText: Italian woman realizing that Italy for the third consecutive time is not playing in the World Cup

title: Exhausted Employee Meme Video
description: A humorous video prompt depicting an overwhelmed worker buried in paperwork while trying to keep up with Elon Musk's various companies.
promptText: Image of a completely exhausted man surrounded by papers and computers, with the text: “Me trying to keep up with Elon: Tesla, SpaceX, xAI, Twitter, Neuralink, The Boring Company… and I can’t even answer messages in my family group chat 😂”

title: Spanish Political Voiceover Prompt
description: A specific instruction for adding a Spanish-language voiceover with deep philosophical and political undertones to a video.
promptText: Add voice off in Spanish: Who follows the coward who, for fear of showing himself as he is, hides in a script that says what those who follow him want to hear.

title: Poetic Love in the Rain
description: A romantic and atmospheric video prompt depicting love celebrated in the rain amidst the silence of time.
promptText: Time stands still when clocks forget their duty. Only the silence between two heartbeats and our love, which must be celebrated... even in the rain.

title: Argentina World Cup Fan Animation
description: A video generation prompt featuring a female fan supporting the Argentina national team for the 2026 World Cup, maintaining facial identity from a reference photo.
promptText:
I'm supporting the Argentina National Team. Messi. 2026 World Cup. 
Keep the woman exactly as in the reference photo: her face, curly brown hair adorned with a sparkling tiara and pink flower, elegant jewelry, seated pose with legs crossed while holding a bouquet of pink peonies, confident expression, and all details...
